item.title: Kalshi traders don't see Strait of Hormuz traffic returning to normal until July
item.description: Chances that traffic returns to normal fell below 50% on Wednesday, according to Kalshi bettors, despite the U.S. and Iran extending the ceasefire.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Honeywell, Nokia, Netflix, IBM, Tesla & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves before the bell.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Tesla, IBM, ServiceNow, Southwest Airlines and more
item.description: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

item.title: Volkswagen announces voice AI in its Chinese cars from later this year
item.description: Volkswagen revealed four cars, including the ID. UNYX 09, which the company said it co-developed with EV maker Xpeng in two years.

item.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
item.description: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.
